subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested His Cause with a sovereignty that hath subdued all who are in the heavens and on earth. Verily, He speaketh the truth and calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر امره بسلطان غلب من فی السموات و الارضین انه ینطق بالحق و یدع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mystical themes
